data.name: PageTitle
data.comment: Page title for general settings

data.name: PageDescription
data.comment: Page description for general settings

data.name: BreadcrumbTitle
data.comment: Breadcrumb title for general settings

data.name: EmailSettingsTitle
data.comment: Title for email settings section

data.name: DefaultEmailDomainLabel
data.comment: Label for default email domain setting

data.name: DefaultEmailDomainDescription
data.value: Adja meg melyik tartományt akarja használni az új adatok létrehozásánál.
data.comment: Description for default email domain setting

data.name: DefaultEmailDomainDescriptionNote
data.value: Megjegyzés: A privát tartományos e-mailek a végpontokban titkosítottak, ezért csak Ön tudja őket elolvasni. Ezzel szemben a publikus tartományok esetén mindenki el tudja olvasni, aki ismeri a befogadó e-mailt.
data.comment: Note for default email domain setting explaining the difference between private and public domains.

data.name: DefaultEmailDomainLearnMore
data.comment: Link to documentation for default email domain setting

data.name: PrivateDomainsLabel
data.comment: Label for private domains group

data.name: PrivateDomainsDisabledLabel
data.comment: Label for private domains group when no private email domains are configured

data.name: PublicDomainsLabel
data.comment: Label for public domains group

data.name: AutoEmailRefreshLabel
data.value: Auto refresh emails content when new ones arrive
data.comment: Label for auto email refresh setting

data.name: AliasSettingsTitle
data.comment: Title for identity generator settings section

data.name: AliasGenerationLanguageLabel
data.comment: Label for alias generation language setting

data.name: AliasGenerationLanguageDescription
data.value: Állítsa be a személyiség generáláshoz preferált alap nyelvet.
data.comment: Description for alias generation language setting

data.name: AliasGenerationGenderLabel
data.comment: Label for alias generation gender setting

data.name: AliasGenerationGenderDescription
data.value: Állítsa be a személyiség generáláshoz preferált alap nemet.
data.comment: Description for alias generation gender setting

data.name: RandomOption
data.comment: Random gender option

data.name: MaleOption
data.comment: Male gender option

data.name: FemaleOption
data.comment: Female gender option

data.name: AliasGenerationAgeRangeLabel
data.comment: Label for alias generation age range setting

data.name: AliasGenerationAgeRangeDescription
data.value: Állítsa be a személyiség generáláshoz használt alap kor intervallumot. Ez hatással lesz a születési időre.
data.comment: Description for alias generation age range setting

data.name: ClipboardSettingsTitle
data.comment: Title for clipboard settings section

data.name: ClipboardClearSecondsLabel
data.comment: Label for clipboard clear seconds setting

data.name: ClipboardClearSecondsDescription
data.value: Automatically clear clipboard contents after copying passwords or other sensitive data.
data.comment: Description for clipboard clear seconds setting

data.name: ClipboardClearDisabledOption
data.comment: Option to disable clipboard clearing

data.name: ClipboardClear5SecondsOption
data.comment: Option to clear clipboard after 5 seconds

data.name: ClipboardClear10SecondsOption
data.comment: Option to clear clipboard after 10 seconds

data.name: ClipboardClear15SecondsOption
data.comment: Option to clear clipboard after 15 seconds

data.name: ClipboardClearLimitationNote
data.value: Note: clearing the clipboard in the web app is only possible when the tab is active. If the tab loses focus, the clipboard will be cleared when it comes back into focus.
data.comment: Note explaining limitations of clipboard clearing feature

data.name: PasswordSettingsTitle
data.comment: Title for password settings section

data.name: AppLanguageTitle
data.comment: Title for app language settings section

data.name: AppLanguageLabel
data.comment: Label for app language setting

data.name: AppLanguageDescription
data.value: Set the language for the application interface.
data.comment: Description for app language setting
